content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Ilm-ewok2.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]'' debuts on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]] in November 1985.]]

A list of events in '''1985''' related to ''[[Star Wars]]''.

==January==
*[[January 5|05]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 81|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 81]] published.
*[[January 6|06]] – [[Hugh Skinner]] is born.
*[[January 12|12]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 82|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 82]] published.
*[[January 15|15]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 94|''Star Wars'' (1977) 94]] published.
*[[January 17|17]] – [[Shea Standefer]] is born.
*[[January 18|18]] – [[Ancuta Breaban]] is born.
*[[January 19|19]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 83|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 83]] published.
*[[January 26|26]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 84|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 84]] published.
*[[January 29|29]] – [[Marvel Comics]] begins its [[Ewoks (Marvel)|''Ewoks'']] comic with [[Ewoks (1985) 1|''Ewoks'' (1985) 1]].

==February==
*[[February 2|02]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 85|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 85]] published.
*[[February 9|09]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 86|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 86]] published.
*[[February 12|12]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 95|''Star Wars'' (1977) 95]] published.
*[[February 16|16]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 87|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 87]] published.
*[[February 23|23]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 88|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 88]] published.

==March==
*[[March 2|02]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 89|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 89]] published.
*[[March 6|06]] – [[Meghan Falcone]] is born.
*[[March 9|09]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 90|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 90]] published.
*[[March 12|12]] – ''[[The Ewoks and the Lost Children]]'' published.
*[[March 16|16]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 91|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 91]] published.
*[[March 19|19]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 96|''Star Wars'' (1977) 96]] published.
*[[March 23|23]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 92|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 92]] published.
*[[March 26|26]] – [[Keira Knightley]] is born.
*[[March 29|29]] – [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] (re-issue)
*[[March 30|30]] – [[Víctor Manuel Leza Moreno|Víctor Manuel Leza]] is born.
*30 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 93|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 93]] published.

==April==
*[[April 2|02]] – [[Ewoks (1985) 2|''Ewoks'' (1985) 2]] published.
*[[April 6|06]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 94|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 94]] published.
*[[April 13|13]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 95|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 95]] published.
*[[April 16|16]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 97|''Star Wars'' (1977) 97]] published.
*[[April 20|20]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 96|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 96]] published.
*[[April 27|27]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 97|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 97]] published.

==May==
*[[May 4|04]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 98|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 98]] published.
*[[May 11|11]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 99|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 99]] published.
*[[May 14|14]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 98|''Star Wars'' (1977) 98]] published.
*[[May 18|18]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 100|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 100]] published.
*[[May 25|25]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 101|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 101]] published.
*[[May 28|28]] – [[Emily O'Brien]] is born.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 102|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 102]] published.
*[[June 4|04]] – [[Ewoks (1985) 3|''Ewoks'' (1985) 3]] published.
*[[June 8|08]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 103|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 103]] published.
*[[June 12|12]] – [[Madeleine Roux]] is born.
*[[June 15|15]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 104|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 104]] published.
*[[June 18|18]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 99|''Star Wars'' (1977) 99]] published.
*[[June 22|22]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 105|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 105]] published.
*[[June 29|29]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 106|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 106]] published.

==July==
*[[July 6|06]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 107|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 107]] published.
*[[July 13|13]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 108|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 108]] published.
*[[July 14|14]] – [[Phoebe Waller-Bridge]] is born.
*[[July 16|16]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 100|''Star Wars'' (1977) 100]] published.
*[[July 20|20]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 109|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 109]] published.
*[[July 21|21]] – [[Vanessa Lengies]] is born.
*[[July 27|27]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 110|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 110]] published.
*[[July 30|30]] – [[Ewoks (1985) 4|''Ewoks'' (1985) 4]] published.

==August==
*[[August 3|03]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 111|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 111]] published.
*[[August 10|10]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 112|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 112]] published.
*[[August 13|13]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 101|''Star Wars'' (1977) 101]] published.
*[[August 17|17]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 113|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 113]] published.
*[[August 24|24]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 114|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 114]] published.
*[[August 31|31]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 115|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 115]] published.

==September==
*[[September 7|07]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[The Cries of the Trees]]" aired.
*07 – ''Droids'': "[[The White Witch]]" aired.
*07 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 116|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 116]] published.
*[[September 14|14]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[The Haunted Village]]" aired.
*14 – ''Droids'': "[[Escape Into Terror]]" aired.
*14 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 117|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 117]] published.
*[[September 17|17]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 102|''Star Wars'' (1977) 102]] published.
*[[September 21|21]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[Rampage of the Phlogs]]" aired.
*21 – ''Droids'': "[[The Trigon Unleashed]]" aired.
*21 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 118|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 118]] published.
*[[September 28|28]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[To Save Deej]]" aired.
*28 – ''Droids'': "[[A Race to the Finish]]" aired.
*28 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 119|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 119]] published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – [[Ewoks (1985) 5|''Ewoks'' (1985) 5]] published.
*[[October 5|05]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[The Travelling Jindas]]" aired.
*05 – ''Droids'': "[[The Lost Prince]]" aired.
*05 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 120|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 120]] published.
*[[October 12|12]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[The Tree of Light]]" aired.
*12 – ''Droids'': "[[The New King]]" aired.
*12 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 121|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 121]] published.
*[[October 15|15]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 103|''Star Wars'' (1977) 103]] published.
*[[October 19|19]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[The Curse of the Jindas]]" aired.
*19 – ''Droids'': "[[The Pirates of Tarnoonga]]" aired.
*19 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 122|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 122]] published.
*[[October 25|25]] – [[Christopher Sean]] is born.
*[[October 26|26]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[The Land of the Gupins]]" aired.
*26 – ''Droids'': "[[The Revenge of Kybo Ren]]" aired.
*26 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 123|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 123]] published.

==November==
*[[November 2|02]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[Sunstar vs. Shadowstone]]" aired.
*02 – ''Droids'': "[[Coby and the Starhunters]]" aired.
*02 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 124|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 124]] published.
*[[November 9|09]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[Wicket's Wagon]]" aired.
*09 – ''Droids'': "[[Tail of the Roon Comets]]" aired.
*09 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 125|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 125]] published.
*[[November 16|16]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[The Three Lessons]]" aired.
*16 – ''Droids'': "[[The Roon Games]]" aired.
*16 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 126|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 126]] published.
*[[November 23|23]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[Blue Harvest]]" aired.
*23 – ''Droids'': "[[Across the Roon Sea]]" aired.
*23 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 127|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 127]] published.
*[[November 24|24]] – ''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]'' debuts on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*[[November 30|30]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[Asha (episode)|Asha]]" aired.
*30 – ''Droids'': "[[The Frozen Citadel]]" aired.
*30 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 128|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 128]] published.

==December==
*[[December 3|03]] – [[Ewoks (1985) 6|''Ewoks'' (1985) 6]] published.
*[[December 7|07]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 129|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 129]] published.
*[[December 14|14]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 130|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 130]] published.
*[[December 17|17]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 104|''Star Wars'' (1977) 104]] published.
*[[December 21|21]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 131|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 131]] published.
*[[December 28|28]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 132|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 132]] published.

==Unknown==
*''[[Wicket and the Dandelion Warriors: An Ewok Adventure]]'' published.
*''[[The Lost Prince: A Droid Adventure]]'' published.
*''[[Star Wars Annual Featuring Ewoks]]'' published.
*''[[The Empire Strikes Back (arcade game)]]'' released.
*Publication of ''[[Stjärnornas krig]]'' ends.

==Miscellaneous==
*[[Kenner Products|Kenner]] release its last action figures of the ''Star Wars'' line.
**[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] [[Carbonite/Legends|Carbonite]]
**[[Saelt-Marae/Legends|Saelt-Marae]] aka Yak Face
**[[Amanaman/Legends|Amanaman]]

**[[EV-9D9/Legends|EV-9D9]]

**[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] pop-up [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]

*Kenner release its action figures of the ''Ewoks'' line.
**[[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Warrick]]
**[[Logray/Legends|Logray]]
**King [[Gorneesh/Legends|Gorneesh]]
**Lady [[Urgah|Urgah Gorneesh]]

**[[Dulok/Legends|Dulok]] Scout

*Kenner release its action figures of the ''Droids'' line.
**[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
**A-Wing Pilot
**[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]
**[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]
**[[Thall Joben/Legends|Thall Joben]]
